description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The front facade features large glass windows, a wooden main door, and a covered carport with a red car parked underneath. The ground floor includes a small garden area adjacent to the carport, and the upper floor has a balcony with glass railings overlooking the front. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some dark accents around the carport and entryway. The rear and side facades are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, a carport, and a small garden area, featuring a clean white exterior and glass balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, carport with a red car, balcony, and garden area.
description_view_1: Side/rear view with mostly solid white walls and minimal window openings, highlighting the house's privacy.
description_view_2: Back view with solid walls and a few small windows, showing the rear entry and upper-level layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view, emphasizing the house's rectangular shape and lack of exterior detailing on this side.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows at the front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a wooden door, covered porch, and adjacent carport; features large glass panels and a small garden.
